sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8360" key="a)nepignw/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεπι-γνώμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <sense id="n8360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">onos, ignorant, unconscious,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:1:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.45</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
